discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Reported Pearson r = -0.43, p = 0.00222 matches model result r = -0.431, p = 2.22e-03 within ±10% relative difference. The correlation coefficients differ by only ~0.2% (rounding from -0.431 to -0.43), and the p-values are essentially identical (2.22e-03 = 0.00222). N=48 samples with 9 HIP1 promoter CpGs averaged.
